name: Shrimp a La Pietro
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook shrimp for 3 minutes until pink.
2. Drain the shrimp and set aside.
3. In a large skillet, melt butter over medium heat. Add mushrooms and sauté for 5-8 minutes until they are softened.
4. Add salt, pepper, paprika, and onion powder to taste.
5. Crumble blue cheese over the top of the mushroom mixture.
6. Transfer the shrimp to an oven-safe dish and bake at 400°F (200°C) for 15 minutes or until heated through.
